posts.text: Donald Trump will be given options for action on China if US investigations determine that industrial overcapacity is influencing Chinese exports, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-17/us-to-mull-action-if-china-overcapacity-found-trade-envoy-says?taid=6a09c7272096e10001cd16df&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: Many suspect AI is to blame for recent graduates’ poor job prospects. Economists are divided. We conducted our own analysis to see how those fields more exposed to the tech are faring https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/05/13/is-ai-putting-graduates-out-of-work-already?taid=6a09c5319139890001bad430&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist
